plugins.name: slack-notifications
plugins.author: LeadLab
plugins.description: Send Slack messages to a configurable channel when key CRM events occur: new lead, lead won/lost, task overdue, proposal accepted.
plugins.install: Built-in — enabled by default in LeadLab v2.4+.

plugins.name: linkedin-enrichment
plugins.author: LeadLab
plugins.description: Given a LinkedIn profile URL on a customer record, fetches public profile data (name, title, company, avatar) via a proxy API and updates the customer fields.
plugins.install: Built-in — enabled by default in LeadLab v2.4+.

plugins.name: voip-click-to-call
plugins.author: LeadLab
plugins.description: Integrates with Twilio to place calls directly from a lead detail page. Call duration and recording URL are logged as a CALL activity.
plugins.install: Built-in — enabled by default in LeadLab v2.4+.

plugins.name: email-sequences
plugins.author: LeadLab
plugins.description: Multi-step drip campaign plugin. Define timed email sequences triggered by lead status transitions. Celery beat schedules individual sends.
plugins.install: Built-in — enabled by default in LeadLab v2.4+.
